Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
133 
LINE_MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Line Medicaid Allowed Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The maximum amount displayed at the claim line level as determined by the payer as being 
"allowable" under the provisions of the contract prior to the determination of actual payment. 
SHORT NAME: LINE_MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
LONG NAME: LINE_MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF)
